name: Michele's Triple c Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter, sugar, and brown sugar until well blended.
2. Add the eggs one at a time, blending well after each addition.
3. Mix in the vanilla extract.
4. Sift together the flour, baking soda, and salt.
5. Gradually add the sifted ingredients to the butter mixture, stirring until combined.
6. Stir in the chocolate chips and chopped pecans.
7. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto a well-greased cookie sheet.
8. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 12 minutes.
